mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO ( ESNTL_ID , EMPLYR_ID , USER_NM , PASSWORD , PASSWORD_HINT , PASSWORD_CNSR , EMPL_NO , IHIDNUM , SEXDSTN_CODE , BRTHDY , AREA_NO , HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO , HOUSE_END_TELNO , FXNUM , HOUSE_ADRES , DETAIL_ADRES , ZIP , OFFM_TELNO , MBTLNUM , EMAIL_ADRES , OFCPS_NM , GROUP_ID , ORGNZT_ID , PSTINST_CODE , EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE , SBSCRB_DE , CRTFC_DN_VALUE ) VALUES ( #{uniqId} , #{emplyrId} , #{emplyrNm} , #{password} , #{passwordHint} , #{passwordCnsr} , #{emplNo} , #{ihidnum} , #{sexdstnCode} , #{brth} , #{areaNo} , #{homemiddleTelno} , #{homeendTelno} , #{fxnum} , #{homeadres} , #{detailAdres} , #{zip} , #{offmTelno} , #{moblphonNo} , #{emailAdres} , #{ofcpsNm} , #{groupId} , #{orgnztId} , #{insttCode} , #{emplyrSttusCode} , NOW()::timestamp(0) , #{subDn} )
mapper.select: SELECT ESNTL_ID as "uniqId", 'USR03' as "userTy", EMPLYR_ID as "emplyrId", USER_NM as "emplyrNm", PASSWORD as "password", PASSWORD_HINT as "passwordHint", PASSWORD_CNSR as "passwordCnsr", EMPL_NO as "emplNo", IHIDNUM as "ihidnum", SEXDSTN_CODE as "sexdstnCode", BRTHDY as "brth", AREA_NO as "areaNo", HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO as "homemiddleTelno", HOUSE_END_TELNO as "homeendTelno", FXNUM as "fxnum", HOUSE_ADRES as "homeadres", DETAIL_ADRES as "detailAdres", ZIP as "zip", OFFM_TELNO as "offmTelno", MBTLNUM as "moblphonNo", EMAIL_ADRES as "emailAdres", OFCPS_NM as "ofcpsNm", GROUP_ID as "groupId", ORGNZT_ID as "orgnztId", PSTINST_CODE as "insttCode", EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE as "emplyrSttusCode", to_char(SBSCRB_DE, 'YYYY MM DD') as "sbscrbDe", CRTFC_DN_VALUE as "subDn" FROM LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}
mapper.update: UPDATE LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO SET EMPLYR_ID = #{emplyrId} , USER_NM = #{emplyrNm} , PASSWORD_HINT = #{passwordHint} , PASSWORD_CNSR = #{passwordCnsr} , EMPL_NO = #{emplNo} , IHIDNUM = #{ihidnum} , SEXDSTN_CODE = #{sexdstnCode} , BRTHDY = #{brth} , AREA_NO = #{areaNo} , HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO = #{homemiddleTelno} , HOUSE_END_TELNO = #{homeendTelno} , FXNUM = #{fxnum} , HOUSE_ADRES = #{homeadres} , DETAIL_ADRES = #{detailAdres} , ZIP = #{zip} , OFFM_TELNO = #{offmTelno} , MBTLNUM = #{moblphonNo} , EMAIL_ADRES = #{emailAdres} , OFCPS_NM = #{ofcpsNm} , GROUP_ID = #{groupId} , ORGNZT_ID = #{orgnztId} , PSTINST_CODE = #{insttCode} , EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = #{emplyrSttusCode} , CRTFC_DN_VALUE = #{subDn} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LET_TH_EMPLYR_INFO_CHANGE_DTLS ( EMPLYR_ID , EMPL_NO , SEXDSTN_CODE , BRTHDY , AREA_NO , HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO , HOUSE_END_TELNO , FXNUM , HOUSE_ADRES , DETAIL_ADRES , ZIP , OFFM_TELNO , MBTLNUM , EMAIL_ADRES , GROUP_ID , ORGNZT_ID , PSTINST_CODE , EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE , ESNTL_ID , CHANGE_DE ) SELECT EMPLYR_ID , EMPL_NO , SEXDSTN_CODE , BRTHDY , AREA_NO , HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO , HOUSE_END_TELNO , FXNUM , HOUSE_ADRES , DETAIL_ADRES , ZIP , OFFM_TELNO , MBTLNUM , EMAIL_ADRES , GROUP_ID , ORGNZT_ID , PSTINST_CODE , EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE , ESNTL_ID , NOW()::timestamp(0) FROM LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) as "usedCnt" FROM( SELECT EMPLYR_ID as "userId" FROM LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO UNION ALL SELECT ENTRPRS_MBER_ID as "userId" FROM LET_TN_ENTRPRS_MBER UNION ALL SELECT MBER_ID as "userId" FROM LET_TN_GNRL_MBER ) A WHERE "userId" = #{checkId}
SELECT PASSWORD as "password" FROM LET_TN_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}
